title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Toko, Unknown person #6, Orochi Forces, Unknown person #7, Luffy as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WhAA AAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The doggy and the kitty...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are here too!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I heard they died...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I don't know if Nekoma- mushi has arrived yet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh? What's with that face?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I am so happy... too happy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: but I will not cry... because I am the daughter of a Samurai!!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Ahahaha!! Big sis, you're hilarious!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kya - 2 ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got these six people, along with momonosuke...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Inuarashi

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I haven't met the last three yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of them is KAWAMATSU, the man I was just talking about...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the other two are Denjiro and Ashura Douji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But right now, the capital is in chaos because of this picture... so they will definitely appear when they see it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no idea where those three are or whether they are safe...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that picture helped us spread the information faster, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The most important part, the MEETUP LOCATION, was leaked... and now our allies are being captured one by one...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how you look at it, it's not a good situation. I wonder what's gonna happen...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may have more 8047MEW now, but our 8047 definitely isn't moving like we want it to. Maybe I should stop thinking about it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, yes. You need to rest, zerojuro.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That way your wounds can heal! Please go to sleep.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am so happy..... my brother is alive, O-TOKO!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Pregnancy's comments

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Yeah, that's great! Ahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're so loud. How am I supposed to sleep like th-...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But to think that he's still eight years old! How mysterious.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone is going to look the same as back then....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder what would happen if I went to meet them now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... Maybe I should wait until after the final battle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Otherwise it might disturb their plans, isn't that right, O-TOKO?

dialogue.speaker: Orochi Forces
dialogue.text: The Flower Capital + RaseTSU* District

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Get in there, you traitors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: URGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you all were living off the capital's resources while waiting for the chance to Rebel!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How impudent!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: silence!! If that is the truth, then why do you also have this RIDDLE in your possession?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Orochi put out an imperial order. So just stay in there and behave yourselves!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: how unfortunate... your PLAM has been exposed already...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You have failed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold on just a second, sir Fukuro- Kuju! What proof do you have that the symbol is a mark of rebellion!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's nothing more than a long forgotten symbol that used to be popular...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I know nothing of any Rebel- Lion!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi Forces
dialogue.text: RaseTSU District - Prison

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: to think there were this many...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what will become of you if you try to oppose Lords Orochi and Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of you passerboys... take a close look!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Look at those idiots!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a show!! Look, more are being thrown in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is the worst possible situation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope they don't think we ran our mouths...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The following is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Captain... Will definitely believe us...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: UDon - The prisoner mines

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ALPACA- MAN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Madillo- Man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I wanna sumo wrestle, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A. Yes, I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: PACA- CACA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the end of the line for you two.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have SEASTONE bullets, made exclusively in the Wano Country!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: An armadillo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Heeeeey, put your gun away, Madillo- Man!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: GIFTERS MADILIONAN armadillo smile user

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 66 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
